betterquesting:10.desc:8:
§6Well & Water Filter§f

§aGenerate water and produce fresh water + salt passively.§f

The §bWell§f provides an infinite water source — right-click with a bucket for Water Buckets, or with a Glass Bottle for Water Bottles. It also accepts §bFresh Water§f items to duplicate them. The Well tooltip reads: "Oh, maybe not very useful. - Sjin" — but it is essential for early-game water access.

§6Well Crafting§f:
§eShaped recipe:§f (check JEI for exact arrangement of stone and water-related materials)

§6Water Filter§f:
The §bWater Filter§f sits in the center of a §e5×5§f water source area and converts §bWoven Cotton§f into §eFresh Water§f + §eSalt§f. The filter requires at least §e5 water source blocks§f within a §e2-block radius§f to function — place it surrounded by water on a flat surface.

§6Water Filter Crafting§f:
§eShaped recipe:§f
§b• 8× Iron Bars§f (surrounding)
§b• 1× Stone§f (center)

§6Filter Operation§f:
§b• Input§f: §bWoven Cotton§f (top slot)
§b• Output§f: §eFresh Water§f (configurable amount) + §eSalt§f (configurable amount)
§b• Processing Time§f: Configurable via §bHarvestCraft config§f (default ~§e25 seconds§f)
§b• Speed Bonus§f: More water blocks nearby = faster processing (radius §e2§f)

§6Automation§f:
The Water Filter is fully automatable via §bhoppers§f, §bitemducts§f, or any item transport. Insert §bWoven Cotton§f from the top, extract §bFresh Water§f and §bSalt§f from the bottom. Pair with a §bCotton Farm§f for a self-sustaining salt and water supply.

§eTip§f: Fresh Water and Salt are used in dozens of HarvestCraft recipes — soups, sodas, sauces, and more. Set up a row of Water Filters near an ocean for maximum throughput.
